name: occipital lobe region volumes
description: Quantitative assessment of occipital lobe subregions for visual processing and neurodegenerative disease evaluation.

attributes.name: occipital lobe volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left occipital lobe, clinically relevant for visual processing and cortical integrity.

attributes.name: occipital lobe volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right occipital lobe, clinically relevant for visual processing and cortical integrity.

attributes.name: medial occipital volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left medial occipital region, clinically relevant for primary visual cortex assessment.

attributes.name: medial occipital volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right medial occipital region, clinically relevant for primary visual cortex assessment.

attributes.name: lateral occipital volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left lateral occipital region, clinically relevant for higher-order visual processing.

attributes.name: lateral occipital volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right lateral occipital region, clinically relevant for higher-order visual processing.
